hero.headline: Macon's *Quick Response* Roofing Crew
hero.subheadline: When storms hit Middle Georgia, we're the crew your neighbors call first. Fast quotes, faster repairs.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every Roof Problem, Handled
services_section.subheading: Storm damage to full replacements — we've seen it all in Middle Georgia weather

services.title: Storm Damage Repairs
services.description: Georgia storms don't mess around, and neither do we. Missing shingles, leaks, and wind damage fixed fast.

services.title: Roof Replacements
services.description: When patching won't cut it anymore, we'll tear off the old and install a roof that lasts decades.

services.title: Emergency Leak Fixes
services.description: Water coming through your ceiling? We'll get out there and stop it before it ruins your floors.

services.title: Roof Inspections
services.description: Climb up there so you don't have to. We'll spot problems before they become expensive disasters.

about.heading: Trevor Woodward — Macon Roofer
about.body: Been fixing roofs around Macon for years. When your roof needs work, you want someone who shows up when they say they will and gets the job done right the first time. That's what we do — no runaround, no surprises, just solid roofing work you can count on.

reviews.name: Brian K.
reviews.text: Trevor responded fast and did excellent work. Couldn't ask for better service — highly recommend.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Middle Georgia
service_areas.subheading: Fast response times throughout the region

cta.heading: Roof Problems Don't Wait
cta.body: Get a straight answer about what your roof needs. Free quotes, no pressure, just honest advice from someone who knows Georgia roofs.
